name: Central Bancompany, Inc.
business: Central Bancompany, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides consumer, commercial, and wealth management products and services through its subsidiary The Central Trust Bank. Its primary markets are in Missouri, Kansas, Oklahoma, and Colorado, serving individuals, businesses, governments, and community organizations. The company operates 155 full-service branches and had $20.75 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2025.

exposures.sentence: We provide a comprehensive suite of offerings, including a full set of deposit products, state-of-the-art digital banking solutions, a range of consumer lending solutions, including home equity lines of credit, and a wholly owned credit card portfolio.
We continuously reinvest in our business and are currently undertaking a banking core modernization project that is intended to provide us with real-time, API-based capabilities.

We have been consistently recognized as providing one of the best HSA programs in the country and are the 18th largest HSA provider as of December 31, 2024, according to a report from Devenir published in April 2025.
Fraudulent activity, information security breaches or cybersecurity-related incidents could cause us material harm.
